name: TariffsFreeComponents Supplier Database

status_policy.Unverified candidate: Real supplier candidate identified from public sources; no origin or tariff advantage has been confirmed.
status_policy.Documented candidate: Public source suggests relevant manufacturing footprint or documentation readiness; still requires supplier-provided records.
status_policy.Verified: Reserved for suppliers that provide product-level origin, HTS, and supporting documents reviewed by the marketplace or a qualified partner.

verification_required_before_badges: supplier confirms product-level HTS classification or classification basis
supplier provides country of origin by SKU or product family
supplier provides certificate of origin or equivalent origin support when applicable
supplier confirms manufacturing location and whether substantial transformation occurs there
supplier provides relevant certifications such as ISO, UL, IATF, AS9100, RoHS, or REACH when applicable
